docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $753.84 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT RUFER, EDWARD J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
